section_schema.name: headline
section_schema.default: Spring styles to wear together or apart, whatever the weather.
section_schema.description: Centered main heading above the three cards

section_schema.name: subtitle
section_schema.description: Small centered line under the headline (often a link label)

section_schema.name: subtitle_url
section_schema.description: Optional URL — when set, the subtitle becomes a link; leave empty for plain text

section_schema.name: cards
section_schema.description: Three editorial cards (image, title, pill button)

fields.name: title
fields.description: Heading overlaid at the bottom of the card (Sleek-style)

fields.name: button_url
fields.description: Button link (internal path or full URL)
